goals: Store personal study preferences and learning style for future reference
Search for previously stored information about a history topic being studied
List all stored memories to review what has been saved
Delete an outdated or incorrect memory entry

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and methodical. Tries to stay organized with study materials and values having quick access to stored information.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands basic study and memory concepts but does not know the internal tool names or technical implementation of the memory system. Treats it as a personal knowledge storage tool.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored preferences, searched for relevant information, reviewed their stored memories, and removed at least one outdated entry.
